system.requirement: If you are clad only in animal pelts…

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} by embodying your wild nature, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} by unleashing your rage (decide before rolling), mark progress on a hit. Then, choose one.

  • Push yourself: @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} (-1).
  • Lose yourself: @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-1).

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} in a fight, and your health is above 0, you may let the pain inflame your wildness (decide before rolling). If you then score a strong hit and choose to embrace the pain, take +momentum equal to your remaining health. A weak hit counts as a miss.
